summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of the Retreat Detail Page feature. All 14 test scenarios passed. The 'View Details' button on RetreatsPage correctly navigates to /retreats/:retreatId. Both Bali (bali-2026) and Gulmarg (gulmarg-2027) detail pages render correctly with all sections: Hero, At a Glance (8 cards), Your Stay, What Awaits You, Inclusions/Exclusions, Sample Itinerary (accordion), Gallery (lightbox), Pricing (Twin Sharing & Single Occupancy), and Request an Invite form. Form submission to /api/contact with source='retreat' works correctly.
passed_tests: Retreats page (/retreats) loads correctly with hero and upcoming retreats section
'View Details' button for Bali retreat navigates to /retreats/bali-2026
'View Details' button for Gulmarg retreat navigates to /retreats/gulmarg-2027
RetreatDetailPage for bali-2026 renders hero with title 'Bali Movement Camp'
RetreatDetailPage for gulmarg-2027 renders hero with title 'The Snow Playground'
At a Glance section shows 8 cards on both retreat detail pages
Your Stay section renders correctly with text and image
About Experience (What Awaits You) section renders correctly
Inclusions/Exclusions section shows both lists with check/X icons
Itinerary accordion items expand/collapse on click (Day 1 tested)
Gallery images are visible and clickable (opens lightbox)
Pricing section shows Twin Sharing and Single Occupancy cards with TBA prices
Request an Invite form on detail page submits to /api/contact with source='retreat'
Form submission shows success message 'We've Got Your Request!' and toast notification
'Request an Invite' button on retreat detail page hero scrolls to invite form (not modal)
Navigating to /retreats/nonexistent-id shows 'Retreat Not Found' fallback with 'Back to Retreats' button
'Request an Invite' button on RetreatsPage still opens the apply modal correctly
Back navigation from detail page to retreats page works correctly

success_rate.backend: N/A (frontend only test - API verified working)

seed_data_creation: Test contact submission created: test_retreat_detail@example.com for Bali Movement Camp retreat
context_for_next_testing_agent: Retreat Detail Page fully implemented and tested. Route: /retreats/:retreatId. Retreat data from /src/data/retreats.js with getRetreatById() function. Two retreats available: bali-2026 (Bali Movement Camp) and gulmarg-2027 (The Snow Playground). Key data-testids: retreat-detail-hero, at-a-glance, glance-{idx}, your-stay, about-experience, inclusions-exclusions, itinerary, itinerary-day-{n}, retreat-gallery, retreat-pricing, request-invite, invite-form, invite-name, invite-email, invite-phone, invite-message, invite-submit, hero-cta. On RetreatsPage: upcoming-retreat-{id}, apply-retreat-{id} (opens modal), details-retreat-{id} (navigates to detail). Form POSTs to /api/contact with source='retreat'.
